sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51210" key="i)so/xnoos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσό-χνοος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n51210.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">equally woolly with</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινι</itype> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.252</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
